summary: Event Attribution Fix Testing - Iteration 174. Backend: 35/35 tests PASSED. Fixed critical syntax error in hot-leads.tsx (extra closing brace). All frontend pages now load without errors. All event logging endpoints working correctly.

fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: SyntaxError at line 188 - extra closing brace `}}}` should be `}}`
fixed_by_testing_agent.impact: HIGH - was breaking the entire app bundle

critical_code_review_comments: All event logging endpoints working correctly (direct log, find-or-create-and-log, messages send)
Performance endpoint correctly aggregates all SMS types: sms_sent + sms_personal + personal_sms + sms_failed
Performance detail endpoint returns correct event lists for texts, calls, emails, cards, reviews
Summary endpoint returns correct daily activity counts
FIXED: hot-leads.tsx had syntax error from event attribution fix - extra closing brace
seed_data_creation: Created test events for all event types during testing (call_placed, sms_sent, personal_sms, email_sent, showroom_shared, birthday_card_sent, review_invite_sent, congrats_card_sent, anniversary_card_sent)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Event attribution fix complete. All backend endpoints tested: POST /api/contacts/{userId}/{contactId}/events, POST /api/contacts/{userId}/find-or-create-and-log, POST /api/messages/send/{userId}/{conversationId}, GET /api/tasks/{userId}/performance, GET /api/tasks/{userId}/performance/detail, GET /api/tasks/{userId}/summary. Fixed syntax error in hot-leads.tsx.

backend_apis.POST /api/contacts/{userId}/{contactId}/: PASS - Creates contact_event with correct event_type and timestamp
backend_apis.POST /api/contacts/{userId}/find-or-crea: PASS - Creates contact AND event for new phone/email
backend_apis.GET /api/tasks/{userId}/performance?peri: PASS - Returns correct counts for the week

frontend_pages./admin/hot-leads: PASS - Loads after fix (was broken by syntax error)

mocked_apis.Twilio SMS: MOCKED - SMS sending goes through native SMS app instead of Twilio API

bug_fix_applied.issue: SyntaxError: Unexpected token - extra closing brace `}}}` in onPress handler
bug_fix_applied.root_cause: During event attribution fix, an extra closing brace was added when wrapping the Linking.openURL call with event logging
